findings.message: New Redis scrape job has no corresponding redis-exporter service defined in any compose file (base.yml, observability.yml, dev.yml, test.yml, staging.yml, prod.yml)
findings.suggestion: Either add a redis-exporter service to infra/compose/observability.yml (and other compose files as appropriate for the deployment topology), or remove the redis scrape job if Redis monitoring is not required

findings.message: New Redis scrape job has no matching alert rules. All alert rules are SLO-based (from slo_alerts.yml) and cover only the app service
findings.suggestion: Define Redis SLOs in the SLO definition (demo.observability.slo module) and regenerate alerts via `task observability:gen`, or document why Redis has no SLOs

findings.message: New Redis scrape job has no matching Grafana dashboard. Dashboards are generated from SLO definitions and currently cover only the app service
findings.suggestion: Define Redis SLOs in demo.observability.slo and regenerate the dashboard via `task observability:gen`, or document why Redis has no dashboard
